layout_structure: The screen uses a vertical stacking layout for major sections (header, tabs, banner, cards, billing, services, bottom nav). The header      and bottom navigation appear fixed. Service categories use a horizontal scrollable tab design. Data summaries are presented in a two-column card layout. Value Added Services are displayed in a horizontally        scrolling grid. Whitespace and card containers are used effectively to delineate different content blocks.

primary_colors.dark_blue: #214389 (Header, Bottom Nav, 'Pay' button, 'More'     button, 'SLT Go' accent)
primary_colors.green: #33cc33 (Active 'Internet' tab background, 'PEO TV' tab, 'Data Add-on' accent, Kaspersky icon)
primary_colors.purple: #6A1A7F ('WEB FAMILY XTRA' & 'DATA Remaining' titles, 'Package      Upgrade' button, Loyalty data text)
primary_colors.cyan: #00ffff ('Extra GB' accent, part of SLTMOBITEL logo)

secondary_colors.light_gray: #f5f5f5 (Card backgrounds, Toggle button backgrounds, general             background)
secondary_colors.white: #ffffff (Text on dark backgrounds, Icons, Main background for some sections)

typography.font_family: Sans-serif (appears to     be a standard system font like Roboto or Open Sans)

font_weights.bold: Section titles ('VALUE ADDED SERVICES'), current data amounts, total payable amount, account number
font_weights.medium_regular: Most        other text (status bar, card details, button labels, service names)

font_sizes.small: Status bar, service tab labels, bottom nav labels, card details
font_sizes.medium: Account number, button labels,          section titles
font_sizes.large: Total payable amount, primary data amounts

typography.text_colors: White on dark blue/purple, Black on light gray, Purple for specific data/titles, Yellow for active tab text.

spacing_and_density.overall_density: Moderate, with a good amount of information presented but generally well-segmented.
spacing_and_density.vertical_spacing: Adequate vertical padding between major sections (e.g.,       header, tabs, banner, cards).
spacing_and_density.horizontal_spacing: Consistent horizontal padding within content blocks and between elements like buttons/icons.
spacing_and_density.padding_and_margins: Good use of internal padding           within cards and buttons, providing breathing room for text and elements.
spacing_and_density.tap_target_size: Most interactive elements (buttons, navigation items, header icons) appear to have sufficient tap target sizes       for comfortable interaction.

accessibility_observations: Color contrast: Generally good for primary text on backgrounds. The yellow text on the light green 'Internet' tab background might be borderline     for some users, but appears acceptable.

Text legibility: Font sizes are mostly readable. Some smaller text elements (e.g., status bar, detailed card info) could be challenging for users with visual             impairments without zoom features.
Icon labels: All functional icons (navigation, services) are accompanied by clear text labels, improving discoverability and understanding.
Tap targets: Interactive        elements are sufficiently sized, reducing accidental taps.
notable_patterns: Dashboard/Account Overview: Common structure for displaying key user-specific information and actions.
Card UI: Used for      grouping related data (data/package summaries) in visually distinct blocks.
Horizontal Scrollable Tabs: For organizing primary categories or services.
Bottom Navigation Bar: Standard pattern for primary     app navigation, always accessible.
Hero Banner: Prominent visual space for branding and key messaging.
Segmented Controls (with unique accent design): Used for selecting or filtering options.
Grid        Layout for Services: A common way to present a list of additional features or offerings.
